actions._comment_step: STEP 0 — DALL-E synthesis of seed image from style + structure references
actions.description: Synthetic seed image created by combining a style reference and a structural reference image using DALL-E image generation.

actions._comment_step: STEP 1 — DALL-E synthesis placed as seed input to Marble
actions.description: DALL-E synthetic seed image placed as input to Marble panorama generation.

actions._comment_step: STEP 2 — panorama generated from seed (single pass, no edits)
actions.description: Equirectangular panorama generated from seed image by Marble.

ingredients.dc:title: {{panorama_ref_title}}
ingredients.description: Reference source consulted when composing the panorama generation prompt (e.g. Manzanar camp map).

actions._comment_step: STEP 3 — 3-D world generated from panorama (single pass, no edits)
actions.description: 3-D world model generated from panorama by Marble.

ingredients.dc:title: {{world_ref_title}}
ingredients.description: Archival source consulted when composing the world generation prompt (e.g. survivor quote / testimonial).

actions.description: Final 3-D world model exported and published with full provenance manifest.

_template_variables._note: All {{variables}} below must be resolved against AA attributes before injection.
_template_variables.file_name: AA attr: file_name on the final world model CID
_template_variables.description: AA attr: description — human-readable summary of the scene
_template_variables.author: AA attr: author — creator / class team name
_template_variables.project_url: AA attr: project_url — link to published webapp (optional)
_template_variables.dalle_prompt: AA attr: dalle_prompt on the synthetic seed CID
_template_variables.dalle_style_cid: CID of the style-reference image fed to DALL-E
_template_variables.dalle_structure_cid: CID of the structure-reference image fed to DALL-E
_template_variables.seed_image_cid: CID of the DALL-E synthetic seed image
_template_variables.panorama_ref_cid: CID of the reference document consulted for panorama generation (e.g. Manzanar map)
_template_variables.world_ref_cid: CID of the archival source consulted for world generation (e.g. testimonial PDF/image)
_template_variables.time_created: AA attr: time_created VC (injected as Verifiable Credential)
_template_variables.registrations: AA attr: registrations VC (injected as Verifiable Credential)
